# flagcdn.io

> Free SVG country flag icons with CDN delivery. ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 codes. 4:3 and 1:1 aspect ratios.

flagcdn.io provides free, open-source SVG country flag icons for developers. All flags follow ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes. Includes 270+ flags in both 4:3 and 1:1 aspect ratios. One line of CSS to get started. MIT licensed, based on lipis/flag-icons.

## Quick Start

Include the CSS:
```html
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://flagcdn.io/css/flag-icons.min.css" />
```

Use a flag:
```html
<span class="fi fi-us"></span>        <!-- 4:3 ratio -->
<span class="fi fi-us fis"></span>    <!-- 1:1 square -->
```

## Direct SVG URLs

- 4:3: `https://flagcdn.io/flags/4x3/{code}.svg`
- 1:1: `https://flagcdn.io/flags/1x1/{code}.svg`
- Short: `https://flagcdn.io/{code}.svg` (4:3)

Where `{code}` is the lowercase ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code (e.g., `us`, `cn`, `gb`, `jp`).

## Features

- 270+ country and territory flags
- SVG format (scalable, lightweight)
- Two aspect ratios: 4:3 (default) and 1:1
- CSS class-based (`fi fi-xx`) or direct SVG URL
- Background image mode with `fib` class
- Free CDN delivery via flagcdn.io, jsDelivr, or cdnjs
- Multilingual interface (EN, ZH, JA, DE, RU, AR)
- Interactive map view for each country
- MIT license

- Homepage: https://flagcdn.io/
